summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary, a bearded man in a white dress shirt and striped tie, speaking directly to camera in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls and framed ranch photographs. In part of the clip an overlaid screenshot of a Fox News article headlined 'New report reveals illegal immigrant population hit new high during Biden-era crisis' is shown over the frame. Burned-in caption subtitles appear at the bottom (for example 'PRESIDENT TRUMP IS' and 'IN HERE'). The audio is him discussing border security and surveying the border wall. No music bed.

script.scene: Bearded man in white shirt and striped tie speaks to camera in a blue-walled office; caption 'PRESIDENT TRUMP IS.'
An overlaid Fox News article screenshot 'New report reveals illegal immigrant population hit new high during Biden-era crisis' appears over the frame; caption 'IN HERE.'
